description_long: This is a single-story, rectangular house with a flat roof, featuring a row of solar panels mounted on top. The exterior is finished in a muted green color with white trim, and the structure includes a covered porch area supported by posts at the front. Windows are modestly sized and asymmetrically placed along the sides, with a small utility box and an exterior ladder visible on one end. The roof appears weathered, and the house sits on a concrete or paved base, suggesting a semi-permanent installation. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A single-story, rectangular house with a flat roof, solar panels, muted green siding, and a covered front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entry, and solar panels on the roof.
description_view_1: Top-down angled view highlighting the full array of solar panels and the paved area around the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall, exterior ladder, and utility box.
description_view_3: Side view showing a small window, steps, and the extension of the paved area.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, simple door, and support posts
